name: X-Force Risky IP, Anonymization
notes: This rule will detect when a local user or host is connecting to an external anonymization service.
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Anonymization Services with confidence value greater than 85
TD_list: APPLY X-Force Risky IP, Anonymization on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
AND when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Anonymization Services with confidence value greater than 85
RED_list: Event name: X-Force Risky IP - Anonymization
Event description: A local user or host is connecting to an external anonymization service.
